h1.span: FB is receiving sACN data via

span.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;
background-color: initial; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

ol.li: Managing multicast communication with sACN data sources.
Binding and unbinding external DMX arrays for data reception.
Implementing logic to handle received sources, including saving, forgetting, and checking known sources.
Supporting various merge rules for integrating data from multiple sources.
Handling different types of sACN packets, including data, sync, and discovery packets.

div.div: FB_sACN_UDP_Communicator designed to manage sACN communication over UDP. It handles the opening and closing of UDP sockets, manages multicast group subscriptions for sACN receivers, and processes incoming sACN data, synchronization, and discovery packets.

ol.li: Managing UDP socket communication for sending sACN data packets.
Writing different types of sACN packets, including data, sync, and universe discovery packets.
Triggering specific actions based on communicator status and socket events, ensuring proper packet transmission.
